title: cordylostigma obtusilobum
intro: Cordylostigma obtusilobum, also known as the 'Khai No' or 'Heart-leafed Cordylostigma', is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been associated with various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cordylostigma obtusilobum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, to treat conditions like fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
